heading: Use of fees collected for Federal migratory bird permits
label: 718k Use of fees collected for Federal migratory bird permits
text: On and after , all fees collected for Federal migratory bird permits shall be available to the Secretary, without further appropriation, to be used for the expenses of the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service in administering such Federal migratory bird permits, and shall remain available until expended.October 21, 1998
